data.name: Hotel Lust
data.detailed_description:
Your boring and monotonous job as a hotel receptionist takes a dramatic turn the day the hotel's oldest employee decides to retire. That old scoundrel approaches you to reveal the hotel's most precious secret, one that will change your life forever.

He leads you to a hidden spot where you can spy into the rooms of the hotel through peepholes connecting to different areas.

You take a peek and find one of the guests you previously checked in, completely lost in passion with her husband. That scene ignites an intense heat within you, and from that moment on, you realize your job is about to become much more exciting.

The next day, new girls start arriving, each with their own problems and personal fantasies. Your role is to assist them at the hotel and then observe what happens in their rooms, deciding whether to just watch or pleasure yourself while enjoying the show. But be careful—not being discreet might get you caught while spying on them.

♥ Mya Landon: She arrives at the hotel with her husband, but she wants to live the life she never could before. She loves teasing and rough sex. A seductive, brave, and independent woman, the "perfect" married life is no longer for her.

♥ Henny Ritcher: A sweet and charismatic girl, completely dedicated to her work and hobby—cosplay. Whenever necessary, she fully immerses herself in her character and will charm you with her playful personality.

♥ Lilith: A moody, spoiled, and selfish young woman who looks down on others as if they were mere toys for her entertainment. Her stunning body opens many doors, as she skillfully uses it to get whatever she desires.

♥ Irina Petrov: A stunning Russian beauty who loves flaunting her body, sculpted by the best surgeons (and hours at the gym). A dominant woman who never hesitates to show off, no matter what others think. She loves experimenting in bed and easily adapts to different partners.

♥ Soyeon Lee: A shy Korean girl who fantasizes about the day she’ll finally gather the courage to show what she’s truly capable of. Her innocence is part of her charm. She knows a lot about sex, but she’s still hesitant to try what truly excites her.

♥ Lana Valentine: The ultimate erotic icon, every man's dream. A true sex addict who lives solely for pleasure. Flirty, playful, and utterly shameless, she’s a predator who can adapt to any fantasy or roleplay—some even consider her a true Goddess of Sex.

FEATURES

  • Finally: animations! Some girls feature a special animated scene.

  • Visual Novel++ Format: Each girl has different story arcs that complete her own narrative.

  • No Censorship!: We've removed censorship from the images (we’ll add an option later to censor them as preferred).

  • Gallery: Fill an image album as you progress through the story and revisit the chapters you've completed.

  • Puzzles: Swap image blocks to restore the full picture and progress through the story.

  • Choose the Girl: Decide which girl to pursue as the story unfolds.

  • Flashback: Go back in the story at any time to change a decision or relive a moment.

  • Smooth Navigation: Choose whether text progresses automatically or skip it to reach your favorite part.

  • Immersive Audio: Including music, sound effects, voices, and "other effects." Adjust volume settings independently or mute everything.

PLEASE NOTE

  • All characters depicted and visually represented in this game are over 18 years old, and no real or identifiable minors were used in the production of this game.

  • Help us out! If you think you can improve the narrative in your language, feel free to send us your suggestions via email or message us on our Steam page.

  • We're still working on it: All updates and improvements we develop will be added to the game at no additional cost.

data.supported_languages: 英文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 簡體中文, 韓文, 日文, 俄文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: WIN XP/Vista/7/8/10/11

  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 Compatible Graphics Card
